text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: There you are, Jordan! Happy birthday!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey, hey, hey! What're ya freaked out for?!
Good ol' Golshi here's trying to wish ya a happy
birthday!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Uh, yeah, but you're going about it all normal. That's what's weird.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Golshi just... wanted Jordan to be... h-happy...
Waaaah!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
For real, would you quit it with the fake tears?
The only person who'd fall for that is, like,
McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Come on, you're spoiling all the fun. Well,
whatever—I put your present in your room, so
don't forget to open it.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
It's nothing crazy, geez. Just a bucket full of natto
beans. Oh, and I stirred it around 100 times so
it's extra slimy. ☆
